text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian has managed to leave quite a mark
on the Twinkle Series.

Together, we've successfully navigated the crucial
first three years of her career.
And today, she's still—
Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: How's our next race, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I see. Good. I'm looking forward to what's to
come.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: What a great race, Brian!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Sis.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Before I knew it, I was cheering with all my might.
But in the next race...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna beat you!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Not so fast! It's gonna be a one-on-one with me! And I'm gonna come out on top!

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
W-wow! What a great lineup! Hurry, get the
camera!

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text: Brian! Who are you racing next?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...I guess this is what it means to be a victim of
your own success.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Whatever. I don't care who's next. I'll take on
anyone.
Well then...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Might I have the privilege of competing against you?

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text: Symboli Rudolf?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
How about it, Brian? Do you accept my
challenge?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Is it okay with you, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! Hurry and call the editorial department!
We've got more interesting news regarding Narita
Brian!

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text: Brian! We'd love to hear about your future goals!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Haha.
As always, she's the center of excitement.
